short_description: A multi-agent AI system for research and review collaboration
domain_summary: The system aims to facilitate collaboration between researchers and reviewers in the academic community.
user_persona: {'name': 'Dr. Emma Taylor', 'title': 'Researcher', 'description': 'A Ph.D. student in Computer Science, working on a research project in Natural Language Processing.', 'goals': ['Collaborate with reviewers to improve research quality', 'Streamline the review process', 'Improve communication between researchers and reviewers']}
architecture_notes: Use a message broker (e.g., RabbitMQ) for inter-agent communication
Implement a knowledge graph using a graph database (e.g., Neo4j)
Use a containerization platform (e.g., Docker) for deployment
frontend_features: {'name': 'research_portal', 'description': 'A web interface for researchers to manage projects and collaborate with reviewers'}
{'name': 'review_portal', 'description': 'A web interface for reviewers to manage reviews and provide feedback to researchers'}
testing_strategy: Unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing using a testing framework (e.g., Pytest)
starter_questions: What are the research goals and objectives?
Who are the target reviewers and what are their expertise areas?
What are the key performance indicators (KPIs) for the system?
workflow_steps: {'name': 'Research Initiation', 'description': 'Researcher initiates a new project and defines research goals'}
{'name': 'Reviewer Assignment', 'description': 'System assigns reviewers to the project based on expertise and availability'}
{'name': 'Review and Feedback', 'description': 'Reviewer provides feedback and ratings to the researcher'}
business_rules: {'name': 'Reviewer Expertise', 'description': 'Reviewer must have expertise in the research area to be assigned to the project'}
{'name': 'Researcher Reputation', 'description': 'Researcher reputation affects the likelihood of being assigned to a project'}

sample_documents.content: This is a sample research project description.
This is a sample review feedback.

tool_catalog.description: A message broker for inter-agent communication

tool_catalog.name: Neo4j
tool_catalog.description: A graph database for knowledge graph storage

outputs: Use a message broker (e.g., RabbitMQ) for inter-agent communication
Implement a knowledge graph using a graph database (e.g., Neo4j)
Use a containerization platform (e.g., Docker) for deployment

outputs: {'name': 'research_portal', 'description': 'A web interface for researchers to manage projects and collaborate with reviewers'}
{'name': 'review_portal', 'description': 'A web interface for reviewers to manage reviews and provide feedback to researchers'}

agent_plan.role: Design persistence models, sample data, indexes, and audit records.

agent_plan.name: Testing Agent
agent_plan.role: Define contract tests, smoke tests, and generated project validation.
outputs: Unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing using a testing framework (e.g., Pytest)

agent_plan.name: DevOps Agent
agent_plan.role: Define environment variables, Docker workflow, and repository packaging.

agent_plan.name: Reviewer Agent
agent_plan.role: Review the generated plan for completeness, security, and portfolio quality.
